content:
🌟 atlantis-android | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: Debugging network traffic from Android applications by capturing and sending it to Proxyman.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic OkHttp traffic interception • WebSocket message capture • Compatibility with Retrofit 2.9+ and Apollo Kotlin 3.x/4.x • Network Service Discovery (NSD) for automatic Proxyman detection • Direct connection support for emulators
📖 Summary: Atlantis Android is a library that captures and inspects HTTP/HTTPS and WebSocket traffic from Android applications. It seamlessly integrates with OkHttp and popular libraries like Retrofit and Apollo, sending the captured data to Proxyman for debugging without requiring proxy configuration or certificate installation.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 arozos | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a functional and user-friendly desktop-like experience on low-power devices, accessible remotely through a web browser, enabling file management, network services, and cloud storage integration.
✨ Key Features: • Web Desktop Interface • File Manager with drag-and-drop, upload • Network Statistic, Static Web Server • mDNS discovery, UPnP Port Forwarding
📖 Summary: ArozOS is a web-based desktop operating system designed for low-power platforms like the Raspberry Pi. It provides a user-friendly interface accessible via a web browser, offering features for file management, networking, and basic system settings, with extensibility through scripting and module development.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 gmail-cleaner | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Bulk cleaning and management of Gmail inbox by unsubscribing, deleting, archiving, and labeling emails.
✨ Key Features: • Bulk Unsubscribe • Delete by Sender • Bulk Delete Multiple Senders • Mark as Read • Archive Emails
📖 Summary: Gmail Cleaner is a free, privacy-focused, self-hosted web application designed to help users manage their Gmail inbox. It allows for bulk operations such as unsubscribing from emails, deleting emails by sender, marking emails as read, archiving, and managing labels, all while running locally on the user's machine.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 DriveLite | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing a secure, private, and self-hostable file storage solution with end-to-end encryption.
✨ Key Features: • Privacy-focused file storage • Self-hostable backend • End-to-end encryption (E2EE) • File sharing • File synchronization
📖 Summary: DriveLite is a fast, minimalist, and privacy-focused file storage application that offers both self-hosting and a free cloud instance. It provides end-to-end encryption, file sharing, and synchronization capabilities, acting as a secure alternative to traditional cloud storage solutions.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 ArchivedV | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To automatically capture and archive unarchived singing streams from YouTube, primarily for Vtubers, ensuring content is preserved despite potential copyright issues or temporary unarchiving.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic checking of subscribed channels for new live streams • Keyword-based video downloading • Web interface for managing channels and keywords
📖 Summary: ArchivedV is a JavaScript-based service designed to automatically download and save singing streams from YouTube, particularly those by Vtubers, which are often unarchived due to copyright concerns. It allows users to filter streams by keywords, manage subscriptions via a web interface, and includes features for handling stream interruptions and sending notifications.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ dockmon | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Monitoring and managing Docker containers across multiple hosts with features like auto-restart, alerting, and stack deployment.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-Host Monitoring • Agent-Based Remote Monitoring • Real-Time Dashboard • Real-Time Statistics • Historical Stats
📖 Summary: DockMon is a comprehensive platform for monitoring and managing Docker containers across multiple hosts. It offers real-time dashboards, intelligent auto-restart, advanced alerting, and detailed event logging, with features for stack management and secure remote monitoring.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
